title: The Giant Jack Becomes the Road
description: Enel’s massive thundercloud descends toward the island, forcing everyone to face the full scale of his destruction.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 12, 13, this scene focuses on Luffy, Enel, Conis, Nami, Aisa. Enel’s massive thundercloud descends toward the island, forcing everyone to face the full scale of his destruction.

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: The lightning cloud became a sphere...

dialogue.speaker: Pagaya
dialogue.text: In a flash, our island was...?

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Ah yes, what a splendid view...

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: This is how the sky should be.

dialogue.speaker: Pagaya
dialogue.text: That was an enormous, rumbling just now.

summary: Enel’s massive thundercloud descends toward the island, forcing everyone to face the full scale of his destruction.
